name: Trade Table
source: Five Parsecs from Home Core Rules p.79
description: D100 Trade Table. Roll once per crew member Trading. Additional rolls cost 3 credits each.

results.name: A personal weapon
results.effect: Roll once on the Low Tech Weapon Table (p.28)

results.name: Sell some cargo
results.effect: Earn 2 credits

results.name: Find something useful
results.effect: Roll once on the Gear Table (p.29)

results.name: Quality food and booze
results.effect: Recruit a new character to your crew. Single-use.

results.name: Instruction book
results.effect: A crew member of choice can read it and earn +1 XP. Single-use.

results.name: Bits of scrap
results.effect: You sell it on to an interested party, earning 1 credit of profit

results.name: Medical pack
results.effect: Receive your choice of a Stim-pack or Med-patch

results.name: Worthless trinket
results.effect: Worthless? Roll 1D6. On a 6, earn +1 story point.

results.name: Local maps
results.effect: If you receive a Quest on this or the following world, you may immediately add 1 Rumor. Single-use.

results.name: Luxury trinket
results.effect: If Recruiting, you may use it as a gift to receive a +2 bonus to the roll. Alternatively, you can sell it: Roll twice on the Trade Table and select the result you prefer. If a Swift character finds this, they will keep it for themselves, earning +2 XP. Single-use.

results.name: Basic supplies
results.effect: Skip Upkeep costs for one campaign turn. Single-use.

results.name: Contraband
results.effect: You can turn this down, but if you accept it, you earn 1D6 credits from selling it on. If you roll a 4-6, you also receive a Rival.
results.roll_info: 1D6 credits; on 4-6 also gain a Rival

results.name: Gun Upgrade Kit
results.effect: Receive your choice of a Laser Sight, Bipod or Beam Light
items: Laser Sight OR Bipod OR Beam Light

results.name: Useless trinket
results.effect: Useless? Roll 1D6. On a 6, earn +1 story point.

results.name: Trade goods
results.effect: Every time you arrive on a new planet, you may roll 1D6 to see how many Credits the goods will sell for here. You can wait as long as you like, but if you roll a 1, they have perished or become damaged, and are now worthless.

results.name: Something interesting
results.effect: Roll once on the Loot Table (p.131)

results.name: Fuel
results.effect: Roll 1D6. You have secured that many credits worth of fuel, which can be used to offset travel costs.

results.name: Spare parts
results.effect: Add +1 when making a Repair attempt. If the roll is a natural 1, the Spare Parts are used up and must be erased from your roster.

results.name: Tourist garbage
results.effect: Not actually worth anything, but roll 1D6. On a 5-6, you can add 1 story point.

results.name: Don't usually see these for sale
results.effect: You may pay 3 credits. If you do, you can roll on the Loot Table (p.131). The item must be used by the crew member who went trading.
results.roll_info: Pay 3 credits to roll on Loot Table

results.name: Ordnance
results.effect: You receive 3 grenades (Frakk or Dazzle in any combination you like)

results.name: Basic firearms
results.effect: Your choice of a Handgun, Colony Rifle, or Shotgun
items: Handgun OR Colony Rifle OR Shotgun

results.name: Odd device
results.effect: If you want to buy this, pay 1 credit, then roll 1D6. On a 6, you can roll on the Loot Table (p.131). On any other score, it's complete garbage.
results.roll_info: Pay 1 credit, 1D6: on 6 roll Loot Table

results.name: Military fuel cell
results.effect: Zero travel costs when jumping to a new planet. Single-use.

results.name: Hot tip
results.effect: Gain 1 Quest Rumor

results.name: Insider information
results.effect: Automatically obtain a Patron next campaign turn, if you look for one. Single-use.

results.name: Army surplus
results.effect: Your choice of an Auto Rifle, Blast Pistol or Glare Sword
items: Auto Rifle OR Blast Pistol OR Glare Sword

results.name: A chance to unload some stuff
results.effect: A revolutionary will buy any weapons for 2 credits each, provided they are not damaged.

results.name: A lot of blinking lights
results.effect: Roll once on the Gear subsection of the Loot Table (p.132)

results.name: Gently used
results.effect: Roll once on the Gear subsection of the Loot Table (p.132). The item is damaged and needs Repair.

results.name: Pre-owned
results.effect: Roll once on the Loot Table (p.131). The item is damaged and needs Repair.

results.name: Medical reserves
results.effect: Obtain 2 Stim-packs and 2 Med-patches

results.name: Starship repair parts
results.effect: Count as 1D6 credits for the purpose of repairing Hull Point damage. Single-use.
results.roll_info: 1D6 credits worth of Hull Point repairs
